basic_details.job_title: GPSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Lecturer, Assistant Professor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Goa Public Service Commission (GPSC) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 10 July 2026 on the official website https://gpsc.goa.gov.in. A total of 7 vacancies for Deputy Captain of Ports, Marine Engineer & Ship Surveyor, Lecturer, Assistant Archivist Grade-I, and Assistant Professor posts have been announced through the GPSC Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age limit is 45 years for all posts.
age_limit.details: Deputy Captain of Ports: Maximum age is 45 years. Marine Engineer & Ship Surveyor: Maximum age is 45 years. Lecturer in Psychiatry: Maximum age is 45 years. Lecturer in Physics: Maximum age is 45 years. Assistant Archivist Grade-I: Maximum age is 45 years. Assistant Professor in Tabla: Maximum age is 45 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters Degree, Medical Qualification, Certificate of Competency, Experience in relevant fields, Knowledge of Konkani and Marathi are required for various posts.
qualification.details: Certificate of Competency as Master of Foreign going Steamship (Valid throughout the Commonwealth) Certificate of Sight test inform-vision issued by the Mercantile Marine Department of the Government of India About 5 years experience as Chief Officer in Foreign going Steamship Knowledge of Konkani | Certificate of competency as 1st Class Engineer (Motor) issued under the Merchant Shipping Act, 1958 (Central Act 44 of 1958) 3 years experience as 2nd Class Engineer on board foreign going /home trade ships Certificate of sight test in Form Vision and Colour Vision from a Medical Board Knowledge of Konkani | A recognised medical qualification included in the First or the Second Schedule or Part II of the Third Schedule (other than licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (Act No. 102 of 1956). Holders of qualifications included in Part II of the Third Schedule should also fulfill the conditions stipulated in sub-section (3) of section 13 of the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (Act No. 102 of 1956). Post-graduate degree or equivalent qualification in the speciality concerned from a National Medical Commission (then Medical Council of India) recognized medical college/institution. At least three years experience in the concerned speciality as Senior Resident/Registrar/Tutor/Demonstrator in a recognised Medical College/Teaching Institution after the requisite post-graduate degree. Knowledge of Konkani. | Masters Degree in the appropriate branch of Humanities and Sciences with minimum First Class. Knowledge of Konkani. | Masters Degree in Indian History from a recognized University or equivalent. Two years experience of: Research of modern Indian History or Teaching of Modern Indian History in University or College or Work in relevant field. Certificate Course in Portuguese Language of six months from a recognized Institute Knowledge of Konkani. | Good Academic record with at least 55% of marks or equivalent grade at Master's Degree level in the relevant subject from an Indian University or an equivalent degree from a foreign University. National Eligibility Test (NET)/State Level Eligibility Test (SET) shall remain the compulsory requirement for appointment as Assistant Professor: Provided, however, that candidates who are or have been awarded Ph. D. Degree in compliance of the “University Grants Commission (minimum standards and procedure for award of Ph. D. Degree), Regulation 2009, shall be exempted from the requirement of the minimum eligibility condition of NET/SET for recruitment and appointment of Assistant Professor or equivalent positions in Colleges". Knowledge of Konkani.

salary_details.details: Deputy Captain of Ports: As per pay Matrix Level - 11 Marine Engineer & Ship Surveyor: As per pay Matrix Level - 11 Lecturer in Psychiatry: As per revised pay matrix Level 11 Lecturer in Physics: As per pay Matrix Level 9A Assistant Archivist Grade-I: As per pay Matrix Level 6 Assistant Professor in Tabla: As per revised pay matrix level 10

selection_process: Candidates should carefully read the “Instructions” available on Commission's website before filling the application online. Where number of applications received is large
the Commission will short list the candidates to be called for interview as mentioned in the "Instructions".
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GPSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.goa_public_service_commission_gpsc: Masters Degree, Medical Qualification, Certificate of Competency, Experience in relevant fields, Knowledge of Konkani and Marathi are required for various posts.
Maximum age limit is 45 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: GPSC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the GPSC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download GPSC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Certificate of Competency as Master of Foreign going Steamship (Valid throughout the Commonwealth) Certificate of Sight test inform-vision issued by the Mercantile Marine Department of the Government of India About 5 years experience as Chief Officer in Foreign going Steamship Knowledge of Konkani Certificate of competency as 1st Class Engineer (Motor) issued under the Merchant Shipping Act, 1958 (Central Act 44 of 1958) 3 years experience as 2nd Class Engineer on board foreign going /home trade ships Certificate of sight test in Form Vision and Colour Vision from a Medical Board Knowledge of Konkani A recognised medical qualification included in the First or the Second Schedule or Part II of the Third Schedule (other than licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (Act No. 102 of 1956). Holders of qualifications included in Part II of the Third Schedule should also fulfill the conditions stipulated in sub-section (3) of section 13 of the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (Act No. 102 of 1956). Post-graduate degree or equivalent qualification in the speciality concerned from a National Medical Commission (then Medical Council of India) recognized medical college/institution. At least three years experience in the concerned speciality as Senior Resident/Registrar/Tutor/Demonstrator in a recognised Medical College/Teaching Institution after the requisite post-graduate degree. Knowledge of Konkani. Masters Degree in the appropriate branch of Humanities and Sciences with minimum First Class. Knowledge of Konkani. Masters Degree in Indian History from a recognized University or equivalent. Two years experience of: Research of modern Indian History or Teaching of Modern Indian History in University or College or Work in relevant field. Certificate Course in Portuguese Language of six months from a recognized Institute Knowledge of Konkani. Good Academic record with at least 55% of marks or equivalent grade at Master's Degree level in the relevant subject from an Indian University or an equivalent degree from a foreign University. National Eligibility Test (NET)/State Level Eligibility Test (SET) shall remain the compulsory requirement for appointment as Assistant Professor: Provided, however, that candidates who are or have been awarded Ph. D. Degree in compliance of the “University Grants Commission (minimum standards and procedure for award of Ph. D. Degree), Regulation 2009, shall be exempted from the requirement of the minimum eligibility condition of NET/SET for recruitment and appointment of Assistant Professor or equivalent positions in Colleges". Knowledge of Konkani.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Deputy Captain of Ports: Maximum age is 45 years. Marine Engineer & Ship Surveyor: Maximum age is 45 years. Lecturer in Psychiatry: Maximum age is 45 years. Lecturer in Physics: Maximum age is 45 years. Assistant Archivist Grade-I: Maximum age is 45 years. Assistant Professor in Tabla: Maximum age is 45 years.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Deputy Captain of Ports: As per pay Matrix Level - 11 Marine Engineer & Ship Surveyor: As per pay Matrix Level - 11 Lecturer in Psychiatry: As per revised pay matrix Level 11 Lecturer in Physics: As per pay Matrix Level 9A Assistant Archivist Grade-I: As per pay Matrix Level 6 Assistant Professor in Tabla: As per revised pay matrix level 10

rows.event: Last date for filling up the applications

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Candidates should carefully read the “Instructions” available on Commission's website before filling the application online. Where number of applications received is large, the Commission will short list the candidates to be called for interview as mentioned in the "Instructions".

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GPSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GPSC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the GPSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 24 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released in GPSC Notification 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 7 vacancies have been released by the Goa Public Service Commission for various posts including Deputy Captain of Ports, Lecturers, and Assistant Archivist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for GPSC Various Posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the GPSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official GPSC website or the Government of Goa portal.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for GPSC posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts advertised under the GPSC Recruitment 2026 is 45 years. Age relaxation rules may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the official website of Goa Public Service Commission?
faq.answer: The official website for the Goa Public Service Commission (GPSC) is http://gpsc.goa.gov.in. All official notifications and application links are available there.

faq.question: Q6. What are the qualifications required for GPSC recruitment?
faq.answer: Required qualifications vary by post, including Masters Degree, Medical Qualification, Certificate of Competency, and relevant experience. Knowledge of Konkani is also essential for most positions.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for GPSC Various Posts?
faq.answer: The official notification for GPSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 does not mention any application fee. Candidates should verify this in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for GPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for GPSC Recruitment 2026 primarily involves shortlisting candidates based on the number of applications received, followed by an interview. Candidates should refer to the instructions on the commission's website.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the job location be for GPSC posts?
faq.answer: The job location for the posts advertised by the Goa Public Service Commission will be in Goa, specifically in Panaji, with pincode 403001.

faq.question: Q10. What are the salary levels for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the advertised posts varies according to the Pay Matrix Levels, ranging from Level 6 to Level 11, depending on the specific position.
